chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constitutional Petition No.S-295 of 2025 ________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE_________ 1. For orders on office objection “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 08-09-2025 Miss. Mehran Abdullah Jagirani Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, assisted by Mr. Sardar Ali Solangi, Deputy Prosecutor General. -------- Pursuant to the court notices, respondent No.2, 3, 4 and 5 have furnished their statements wherein they have stated that they will abide by the law and will provide protection to the petitioner as and when required. The respondent No.6 and 7 Ghulam Mustafa and Abdullah are present in person and submit that they have not caused any harassment to the petitioner. The learned counsel for the petitioner after going through the statements is satisfied and seeks disposal of the petition in terms of the statement. Order accordingly. The respondents are directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioner as and when required. The petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Asghar Altaf/P.A
